title: Assorted World
description: An assortment of various things than can generate in your world.
body:
# Assorted World [Forge/Fabric] ### Versions 6.0.0 and newer now require [Assorted Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/assorted-lib)
This includes multiple different structures and blocks that can generate in your Minecraft world. Like the other `Assorted Mods` most of these come straight from my old mod GrimPack. ### Randomite First up is I am adding back in Randomite, it has a chance to drop many different blocks and items. ![Randomite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ChPOe1eg/images/99b846a89b25eb3099fac9c616e107bbe82e10cd.png) By default it can drop: - Coal - Iron Ore - Gold Ore - Diamond - Redstone - Lapis Lazuli - Slime Ball - Emerald - Quartz - Egg - Ancient Debris ### Ruins and Structures **Ruins** are structures that are randomly generated within your world that all have a chance of spawning with **Runes**. There are 16 different types of Runes that all have various effects that can be given to the player. (Beware not all **Runes** are helpful) ![Runes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ChPOe1eg/images/172b93998874a26499c15f201f8a73209d0c35bd.png) There are currently 6 types of Ruins that can generate: __Pyramid__: Pyramids are large structures that have started to decay over the years. Most have many levels but can be very rewarding.
Click to expand
__Fountains__: Fountains can be large structures that generate in the water. They can contain spawners and rare loot.
Click to expand
__Snowballs__: Snowballs are massive snow and ice structures. They closely resemble massive snowmen.
Click to expand
__Water Domes__: Water Domes are structures found on the bottom of the ocean that can contain Runes as well as some rare ones are made of uncommon materials.
Click to expand
__Spires__: Spires are natural structures that reach towards the sky. These can contain runes as well as very rarely be 'death spires'.
Click to expand
__Decayed Ruins__: Ruins are remnants of a past civilization. Ruins have decayed greatly over the years but can still contain treasures of old.
Click to expand
